SANDOR
Week Five Video 1: The Click Sequence Tool
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 6 --

Click Sequence
• 	The Purpose Of A Click Sequence Is To Get An Email Subscriber To Go Click A
Link
• 	Article
• Webinar registration
• On-Demand Class
• Sales Letter
• The Sells The CLICK More Than It Sells The THING. (Super important).
• In most cases, it’s followed by a deadline sequence.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 6 --

The Click Sequence Structure
8:30 AM 	11:30 AM
Day 1 	Day 2
8:30 AM 	11:30 AM
Click?
Day 3
8:30 AM 	11:30 AM
Do
Right?
Yes
Next
No
Deadline
No
Click To
Next
Stage
www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 6 --

Subject: 	Get it opened.
Subj: NAME, please read.	1
First sentence: 	Get it opened.
I’m pretty sure this directly affects YOU.	2
Image: 	Get the click.
3
Early CTA: 	Get the click. It’s a new [THING] that shows you how to
[BIG BENEFIT]
4
Benefits: 	“Sell” the click. 	Plus, you’ll also see/discover/learn …
• How to [BENEFIT] without [BAD]
• What NEVER to do when you want to [GOAL]
• Why everything you’ve learned about
[GOAL] is dead wrong, and what you should
do instead.
5
Second CTA: 	“Sell” the click. You can get it here, now.	6
Sign off and PS: 	Re-sell the click
Enjoy,
Rick James, Esq
P.S. In case you skip to the PS (like me),
here’s the deal.
You can get a [THING] that shows/gives/helps/ you
[GOAL] here.
7
Copyright Frank Kern, Inc. A California Company
www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 6 --

Subject: 	Get it opened.
First sentence: 	Announce webinar,
get the click.
Official CTA: 	Get the click.
Call to identity: 	“Pre-Sell” the click.
Introduce Benefits: 	Fuel self interest.
Second CTA: 	“Sell” the click.
Sign off and PS: 	Re-sell the click,
give another CTA
Subj: FINALLY!
I’m holding an advanced class on [TOPIC] on [DATE]
and you can register here (no charge).
Like I said, there’s no charge and you can register here.
If that sounds like you, this new training is a MUST.
• You want to [BENEFIT] without [BAD]
• You’ve tried to [BENEFIT] before but [FRUSTRATION.]
• You’re an [IDENTITY] who wants to
[BENEFIT] without [BAD]
Enjoy,
Rick James, Esq
P.S.I’ll also be showing you how to
[BENEFIT], plus giving you recent case studies
on how to [BENEFIT] without [BAD].
All free :-) Register here and I’ll see you on the
training.
1
2
3
4
6
8
Copyright Frank Kern, Inc. A California Company
Webinar Invite Email
Here’s what we’ll be covering:
• How to [BENEFIT] without [BAD]
• What NEVER to do when you want to [GOAL]
• Why everything you’ve learned about
[GOAL] is dead wrong, and what you should
do instead.
Qualify: 	“Sell” the click,
fuel self interest.
This is for you if …	5
Register here now.	7
www.getwsodo.com

Click Sequence Framework
1.
2.
3.
4.
5.
•
•
•
6.
7.
